title: Do Solar Panels Work in Winter?
description: Solar panels still produce in winter, though shorter days and snow can reduce total output.
quickAnswer: Yes, solar panels work in winter. Cold temperatures can help efficiency, but shorter days and snow reduce production.

scenario.title: Winter Production Example
details: Annual savings matter more than one month

faqs.question: Should I clear snow from panels?
faqs.answer: Usually no. Safety comes first, and snow often slides off angled panels. Ask your installer for guidance.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy homeowner solar resources
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
